description: NOT DOING EITHER OF THE EXISTING EPDM ROOFS. Remove the existing Da Vinci Roof down to the existing decking and dispose. Inspect the existing decking for rotting/delamination. Should any decking need to be replaced, take photos and call Joey. Install 2 rows of ice and water shield above eaves and 1 row under valleys. Install synthetic underlayment on the rest of the exposed roof deck. Cut in and install 2 turbine vents. Re-flash chimney. Install alpine snow guards where shown on drawing. description: Scope Of Work: Scope Of Work: Residential roof replacement. No structural Changes. Remove existing roofing materials down to the roof deck, including underlayment, flashings, vents, and accessories. Install roofing underlayment over the roof decking for moisture protection. Install ice and water barrier membranes at critical roof areas to help prevent leaks and water intrusion. Install new metal drip edge flashing to direct water away from the roof edge and fascia. Install Owens Corning TruDefinition® Duration Designer® shingles with SureNail® technology as part of the TimeLock™ Roofing System. Install ProEdge® hip and ridge shingles along roof ridges and peaks. Replace or install roof accessories including pipe boots, roof jacks, and exhaust vents. Verify attic ventilation meets code and system requirements. Install step flashing, counter flashing, and transition flashing for proper waterproofing. Remove roofing debris from the property and perform final cleanup and inspection upon completion. Cost: $20,731.89

description: House Roof Replacement. Remove the existing wood shakes down to the decking and dispose. Inspect the existing decking for rotting/delamination. Should any decking need to be replaced, take photos and call Joey. Board up existing box vent holes with plywood plugs. Install 2 rows of ice and water shield above eaves and 1 row under valleys. Install synthetic underlayment on the rest of the exposed roof deck. Install new gutter apron, gable drip edge, preformed valley metal and pipe boots. Cut in and install 3 4" broan vents. Cut in and install 4 14" turbine vents. Overlay EPDM on the existing metal dead valleys. Install starter shingles at both eaves and rakes. Replace counter flashing at masonry on front elevation. Replace roof with Certainteed Presidential IR- Shadow Gray. Clean up and haul away all related debris. R&R all gutters and downspouts
